info.title: Connectwise PSA Public Endpoints
info.description: API documentation for ConnectWise PSA public endpoints, providing details on available operations, parameters, and response schemas for integrating with ConnectWise's professional services automation platform.

get.description: Get a list of companies in ConnectWise to manage customer accounts and business relationships. deletedFlag=false should be sent with conditions to retrieve only companies that have not been deleted.

parameters.name: conditions
parameters.description: Filter results based on fields returned in GET request. Supports operators: =, !=, <, <=, >, >=, contains, like, in, not. Logic operators: AND, OR. For null checks use 'field=null' or 'field!=null'. Examples: 'name="Value"', 'id > 100', 'status/name="Active"', 'dateEntered > [2024-01-01T00:00:00Z]', 'dateResponded=null'. Strings must be quoted, dates use square brackets. Keep total URL under 2000 characters.

parameters.name: childConditions
parameters.description: Search within child arrays or nested objects. Format: 'childArray/field operator value'. Example: 'communications/value like "john@example.com" AND communications/type="Email"'. Supports same operators as conditions parameter.

parameters.name: customFieldConditions
parameters.description: Filter by custom field values. Format: 'caption="FieldName" AND value operator "Value"'. Example: 'caption="Priority" AND value="High"'. Supports operators: =, !=, <, <=, >, >=, contains, like, not.

parameters.name: orderBy
parameters.description: Sort results by specified field. Format: 'fieldName direction' where direction is 'asc' or 'desc'. Examples: 'name asc', 'id desc', 'status/name asc'. Reference fields use forward slash notation.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include in response. Limits returned data to specified fields only. Example: 'id,name,status/id'. Reduces payload size and improves performance. Reference fields use forward slash notation. Not available on reporting endpoints.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number for pagination (1-based). Use with pageSize to navigate through result sets. Default: 1.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Number of records to return per page. Default: 25. Maximum: 1000. Use with page parameter for pagination.

parameters.name: pageId
parameters.description: Alternative pagination identifier. Used for cursor-based pagination in some endpoints.

workflow.description: To get detailed revenue data, first list opportunities with filters (status, date range), then iterate over each opportunity's forecast endpoint
steps: 1. Call getSalesOpportunities with conditions (e.g., status/name='Won', closedDate filters)
3. FOR EACH ID: Call getSalesOpportunitiesByParentIdForecast with parentId={id}
4. FROM EACH forecast response: Extract serviceRevenue.revenue (for labor), productRevenue.revenue (for products)
5. SUM all revenue values across all iterations
